sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Cardiff
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Cardiff City at Pride Park in the 2017-18 campaign in a match with implications in the play-off race.

sky.mix.uk.title: ICC T20 WC Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: New Zealand's T20 World Cup campaign continues at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai with a match-up against the United Arab Emirates - who make their first outing. (10.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ICC T20 WC Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Having survived a huge scare against the Dutch, Pakistan face the United States in a Group A clash from the 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup at Sinhalese Sports Club in Colombo. (10.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: Premier League Greatest Games
sky.mix.uk.description: Take a look back at Leicester City's record-equalling 9-0 demolition of the Saints during the 2019-20 Premier League season, as the Foxes tore 10-man Southampton to shreds.

sky.mix.uk.title: Premier League Greatest Games
sky.mix.uk.description: Revisit a classic serving of Premier League action, as West Ham and a struggling Newcastle United came to blows during the 2019-20 campaign.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Spurs/Chelsea 08
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Spurs and Chelsea go head-to-head at White Hart Lane in an end-to-end encounter that produced eight goals.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Man Utd/Man City
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the Premier League. Here, a memorable Manchester derby at Old Trafford back in the 2011-12 season that saw a six-goal Man City run rampant.

sky.mix.uk.title: TGL Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: A match-up from season two of the TGL as Tiger Woods' Jupiter Links take on last year's runners-up New York Golf Club at the SoFi Center.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Leeds Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
sky.mix.uk.description: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 18/19:Leeds Utd v Derby County
sky.mix.uk.description: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
sky.mix.uk.description: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

sky.mix.uk.title: ICC T20 WC Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Harry Brook skippers England as the two-time winners begin their 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup bid in Mumbai with a group-stage encounter against Rohit Paudel's Nepal. (08.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ICC T20 WC Highlights

Blaze.uk.description: Monster in the Attic, Houston UFO and Utah Bigfoot: Witness supposed video evidence of a UFO over Houston, a creature in an attic and a sighting of Bigfoot in Utah. (S3, ep 12)

Blaze.uk.title: The Proof Is Out There
Blaze.uk.description: Chupacabra, Greatest UFO Photo Ever and Mars Sounds: What's the truth behind the Chupacabra sighting? Is this the greatest UFO photo taken? What are those sounds on Mars? (S3, ep 13)

Blaze.uk.title: What On Earth?
Blaze.uk.description: North Korea Death Star: Satellites capture startling images of a structure in North Korea that may be sinister evidence of a looming nuclear threat. (S6, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: What On Earth?
Blaze.uk.description: Aliens of the Infinity War: Are unusual patterns in an English field really an alien message? And why is there a secret military facility in the Nevada desert? (S6, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: What On Earth?
Blaze.uk.description: The Cave to Hell: Discover images of an Iceland cave that could hold alien secrets, military structures in the Utah desert and a bloody stain in the sands of Saudi Arabia. (S6, ep 5)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The Phoenix Lights Phenomenon: Delve into the popular theories behind the Phoenix Lights phenomena, a series of widely sighted UFOs observed in Arizona and Nevada back in 1997. (S4, ep 5)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The Ark of the Covenant: Investigate the theories behind where the Ark of the Covenant - an artefact thought to be the most sacred relic of the Israelites - may be hidden. (S4, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The 'Missingest' Man in America: Explore the theories behind the disappearance of former New York Supreme Court judge Joseph Force Crater in 1930, a case which remains unsolved. (S4, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
Blaze.uk.description: Beasts Unleashed: Legendary beasts are believed to roam the Earth and the seas. But are these creatures merely metaphors or is there proof they are real? (S2, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Clash Of Ancient Warriors
Blaze.uk.description: Battle of Sekigahara: The Battle of Sekigahara saw Tokugawa Ieyasu emerge victorious over his rival Ishida Mitsunari, uniting the country under the Tokugawa shogunate. (S2, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
Blaze.uk.description: Unnatural Nature: What happens when nature defies the very laws that govern it? The answers may point to a new understanding of our planet. (S1, ep 3)

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Devil's Cut. A Cornelia Marie deckhand suffers a devastating blow that requires emergency surgery at sea by Casey. Meanwhile, Captain Sig is left behind awaiting news from home. S15, Ep15

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Unbreakable. The fleet deal with back-to-back unrelenting storms on the Bering Sea. Freddy attempts surgery on himself and the Summer Bay Crew receives news on Nick's future. S15, Ep16

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Reward Of The Effort. The Opal Whisperers' partnership with veteran miner Uwe ends abruptly. The Misfits finally hit old timers' workings at the bottom of their open cut mine. S6, Ep10

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Safety Thongs. Newcomer, Neil Wilkinson Jr., abseils down a deadly mineshaft in search of cubic fluorite, while Jarrin and Hugh take the plunge into frigid waters. S2, Ep2

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters

Film4.uk.title: The Creator
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4.uk.title: A Hidden Life
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Send Me No Flowers
Film4.uk.description: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

Film4.uk.title: Gunman's Walk
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

Film4.uk.title: Patton
Film4.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

Film4.uk.title: Reality
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

Film4.uk.title: Salt
Film4.uk.description: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

Film4.uk.title: Zola
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

Film4.uk.title: Shiva Baby
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Comedy-drama. A college student struggles to keep a lid on her secrets as she awkwardly encounters her sugar daddy and the ex-girlfriend she's still hung up on at a shiva.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Ride Lonesome
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

Film4.uk.title: Yellow Sky
Film4.uk.description: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

Film4.uk.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

Film4.uk.title: Monkey Business
Film4.uk.description: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

Film4.uk.title: Taxi
Film4.uk.description: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

Film4.uk.title: The Equalizer
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

Film4.uk.title: Deja Vu
Film4.uk.description: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

Film4.uk.title: Undergods
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Dystopian fantasy that weaves together three eerie tales of doomed modernity, framed by the day-to-day of two garbage men who collect corpses from the streets of a ruined estate.

Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Admirable Crichton
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Comedy. Kenneth More stars as the perfect butler, who assumes command when he, his aristocratic employer (Cecil Parker) and his family and friends are shipwrecked on a desert island.

Film4.uk.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start...

Film4.uk.title: Annie
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

Film4.uk.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
Film4.uk.description: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

Film4.uk.title: Central Intelligence
Film4.uk.description: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

Film4.uk.title: The Menu
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

Film4.uk.title: Orphan: First Kill
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Newcastle to Lynemouth: Michael Portillo heads from Newcastle to Lynemouth, and is intrigued to hear of its part in Newcastle's early industrial development. S1 Ep12

UAndYesterday.uk.description: How to Build an Aston Martin: Access all areas to the Aston Martin factory: From the oven baked chassis to being painted in actual moon rock, see how a DBS Superlegerra is made. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: How To Build A Motor Car
UAndYesterday.uk.description: How to Build a Maserati: At the Maserati factory in Turin: Discover how a Quattroporte Super Saloon is built. Using aerospace technology and techniques from robot assembly. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: How To Build A Motor Car
UAndYesterday.uk.description: How to Handbuild a Sportscar: The Morgan Motor Company have opened their doors to reveal how they hand-build their brand new Plus Six. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Windsor to Godalming: While exploring the Wey and Godalming Navigations, Robbie gets caught in a storm and falls off his narrowboat. He also uncovers rock history in Guildford. S6 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Byfleet to Odiham Castle: Robbie's narrowboat gets stuck under a low bridge on the challenging Basingstoke Canal as he battles through water weed. Can he make it to journey's end? S6 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Simon Reeve travels from the Peloponnese peninsula to the rugged and mountainous north of the country and learns how its people cope with seemingly never-ending crises. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: How To Build A Motor Car
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: How to Build a Maserati: At the Maserati factory in Turin: Discover how a Quattroporte Super Saloon is built. Using aerospace technology and techniques from robot assembly. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: How To Build A Motor Car
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: How to Handbuild a Sportscar: The Morgan Motor Company have opened their doors to reveal how they hand-build their brand new Plus Six. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Washington to Mount Vernon: Michael Portillo arrives in Washington, DC, the centre of political power in the US. S1 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Manassas to Jamestown: Michael Portillo arrives in Manassas, Virginia, scene of two crucial battles during the American Civil War. S1 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Windsor to Godalming: While exploring the Wey and Godalming Navigations, Robbie gets caught in a storm and falls off his narrowboat. He also uncovers rock history in Guildford. S6 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Byfleet to Odiham Castle: Robbie's narrowboat gets stuck under a low bridge on the challenging Basingstoke Canal as he battles through water weed. Can he make it to journey's end? S6 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon Reeve travels from the Peloponnese peninsula to the rugged and mountainous north of the country and learns how its people cope with seemingly never-ending crises. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon begins his journey on the island of Hispaniola and its two very different countries of the Dominican Republic - a tourist hotspot - and its poorer neighbour Haiti. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: VW Barndoor Samba: Irv is an expert in VW Sambas, so when a collector with a bunch of rusted panels and the dream of a showroom-quality vehicle needs help, there's only one man for the job. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Rolls Royce Phantom/VW Bettle: Derek's charmed by a 1929 Rolls Royce Phantom with an unusual history, involving a WW1 hero and a tale of fraud. S13 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Paul Smith Mini / TY80: The team send their Paul Smith Mini in for a bit of designer tailoring by the team at Mini Sport. S7 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Manta / Peugeot 205: The Restos team try their hardest not to go too far on an Opel Manta. And a Peugeot 205 GTI brings back happy B-road memories for a mechanic who owned one. S7 Ep3
